build.details: Build completed successfully with no TypeScript errors. Asset size warnings are pre-existing and unrelated to CardsGrid changes.

lint.details: CardsGrid TypeScript files pass ESLint with no errors or warnings. Global lint errors exist in other blocks but are pre-existing.

registration.details: block.json valid with apiVersion 3, all required attributes defined, proper supports configuration, and good example structure.

attributes.details: All attributes (anchor, darkMode, eyebrow, heading, description, columns) are correctly defined in block.json with proper types and defaults. Columns enum restricts values to [1, 2, 3] as designed.

edgeCases.details: Test page includes comprehensive edge case coverage: empty optional fields, long content, mixed content (images/no images), minimal content, many cards (6 items creating 2 rows), and eyebrow-only header.

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements - block is static content display

accessibility.details: Section elements have proper accessible names: aria-labelledby when heading exists, aria-label='Cards Grid' when heading is empty. Images have meaningful alt text from media library. Heading hierarchy is correct (h2 for section, h3 for card titles). ThemeButton handles link accessibility.
accessibility.patternCompliance: skipped - no WAI-ARIA patterns apply to static card grid

markupDuplication.details: No duplicated markup found. Block uses responsive CSS classes (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) rather than duplicating DOM elements.

tsxPhpSync.details: PHP and TSX templates produce identical HTML structure and classes. Critical fixes verified: (1) PHP templates no longer have redundant manual attribute extraction - use auto-extracted variables with ?? null coalescing, (2) Dark mode pattern matches exactly in both files: section gets 'dark bg-transparent!' and container gets 'relative py-10 md:py-15 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8'.
tsxPhpSync.attributeExtraction: pass - no manual extraction, uses auto-extracted variables
tsxPhpSync.darkModeSync: pass - both files use identical dark mode pattern matching project standard

innerBlocks.details: Inner block configuration correct. Allowed blocks limited to 'takt/cards-grid-item', template provides 3 default items, context properly provides columns value to children. Test page shows correct nesting structure with all variations properly rendering child items.

specCompliance.details: Test page contains all 13 required test scenarios from planning spec, all wrapped in DemoContainer blocks with descriptive titles and descriptions. Media IDs are real (19, 18, 17) not placeholders. All variations render correctly on frontend.
testScenarios: Default/Minimal - Light Mode (1 card, heading only)
Dark Mode - No Header (aria-label fallback verified)

passedChecks: block.json is valid with correct apiVersion 3
All attributes defined with correct types and defaults
Test page has 13 block instances with comprehensive edge case coverage
All 13 blocks wrapped in DemoContainer with descriptive content
Sections without heading use aria-label='Cards Grid' fallback
Images have meaningful alt text from media library
Heading hierarchy correct (h2 section, h3 cards)
No duplicated markup - uses responsive CSS classes
PHP templates use auto-extracted variables (no manual extraction)
Dark mode pattern matches project standard in both TSX and PHP
Container has py-10 md:py-15 padding in dark mode
Pseudo-element has before:-inset-y-8 vertical inset in dark mode
Inner blocks configuration allows only takt/cards-grid-item
Context provides columns value to child items
All test scenarios from planning spec present and working

fixesVerified.fix: Dark mode pattern now follows project standard (py-10 md:py-15 on container, before:-inset-y-8 on pseudo)
fixesVerified.evidence: Both CardsGrid.php and CardsGrid.tsx use identical dark mode classes. Page audit confirms dark mode sections render with 'dark bg-transparent!' class. Screenshots show proper dark mode rendering.

fixesVerified.fix: PHP templates no longer have redundant manual attribute extraction
fixesVerified.evidence: CardsGrid.php and CardsGridItem.php use auto-extracted variables with ?? null coalescing instead of manual $var = $attributes['key'] assignments. Only derived variables ($hasInnerBlocks, $hasHeader, $gridClasses, $hasImage, $hasButton) remain.

fixesVerified.fix: Section has aria-label fallback when heading is empty
fixesVerified.evidence: Page audit shows sections 6, 10, and 12 (no heading scenarios) have aria-label='Cards Grid'. Sections with headings have aria-labelledby with auto-generated IDs.

fixesVerified.fix: Test page uses DemoContainer wrappers with 13 comprehensive scenarios
fixesVerified.evidence: Block count shows 13 takt/demo-container blocks, each wrapping one takt/cards-grid instance. Structure tree confirms proper nesting. All planned scenarios present on test page.

fixesVerified.fix: All block instances render correctly with new dark mode pattern
fixesVerified.evidence: Page audit shows all 13 sections rendering with correct classes. Dark mode sections (4, 5, 6) have expected classes. Screenshots captured at 375, 768, 1024, 1440px widths confirm visual correctness.

phpLintNotes.details: PHP CodeSniffer reports errors for CardsGrid files, but these are project-wide conventions that apply to all blocks: (1) Filename casing (CardsGrid.php vs cardsgrid.php) - consistent with all blocks, (2) CRLF line endings - auto-fixable, (3) camelCase variable names ($darkMode, $hasImage, etc.) - matches JavaScript attribute names from block.json, (4) Inline comment punctuation - stylistic, (5) Escaping warnings for class_name() and $children are false positives - these are safe theme helper functions. No new PHP issues introduced by the fixes.
